properties.name: topsoil.seeder.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable automatic database seeding on startup.

properties.name: topsoil.seeder.base-package
properties.description: The base package where your JPA entities are located. Used to resolve short class names in YAML files.

deprecation.reason: Ensure this matches your @Entity scan package.

properties.name: topsoil.seeder.seed-folder
properties.description: The resource folder containing the YAML seed files.
